forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 54. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Rain Showers Likely
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely after 3pm. Partly sunny. High near 76, with temperatures falling to around 71 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and midnight, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. Low around 58, with temperatures rising to around 60 overnight. South southwest wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

sections.header: Traffic Impact: The intersection will be closed to all through traffic
sections.content: . Please follow the posted detour route during construction.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
